item.title: Big Thinkers: Linus Torvalds – How Linux and Git Shaped Modern Cloud Computing
item.description: Modern cloud computing rests on layers of abstraction. Developers deploy containers without thinking about kernels. Platform teams automate infrastructure without touching physical hardware. Kubernetes clusters… Link to article: https://build5nines.com/big-thinkers-linus-torvalds-linux-cloud-computing/

item.title: The Cheapest AI Request Is The Script You Only Had To Generate Once
item.description: There’s a funny pattern that shows up when developers start using AI tools heavily. At first, we ask the model to do everything directly. Find… Link to article: https://build5nines.com/the-cheapest-ai-request-is-the-script-you-only-had-to-generate-once/

item.title: Stop Burning Premium Requests: How to Choose the Right GitHub Copilot Model for the Job
item.description: There’s a moment every developer knows. You ask an AI coding assistant a simple question like: “Rename this variable and update the related tests.” Then… Link to article: https://build5nines.com/stop-burning-premium-requests-how-to-choose-the-right-github-copilot-model-for-the-job/
